calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-05-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine Entitlement
Off Calendar Dec-15-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Owens for Lawrence Middleton. Donald Watson for Rodney Williams.

Mr. Watson stated that their Clients met out in the hallway and that they were in agreement that Mr. Middleton was indeed their Cousin. In addition, he stated that they were withdrawing their petition. Mr. Owens requested an order showing that Lawrence Middleton is the Son fo the Decedent and the sole heir of the estate. The Court informed Mr. Owens that there was no petition before the Court to support an order determining Mr. Middleton's entitlement. Mr. Watson's petition was taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petition To Determine Entitlement
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Continued To Dec-15-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Entitlement
Off Calendar Oct-27-2009 Continued To Nov-17-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (627 Garfield Street S.F.)
Off Calendar Feb-25-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Weinkauf stated the terms of the sale for the record. There being no overbid, the sale was confirmed at $480,000.00 (subject to a written order). Mr. Weinkauf is to prepare the order.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Shannon.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-22-2008 Granted Per Written Order
